title: Status plugin requests (requests.json)
description: Declarative HTTP request definitions. Every URL host must appear in the manifest `domains` list; the request engine rejects undeclared domains.

requests.description: Named request definitions, referenced by triggers and actions.

url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL. May contain template placeholders.

auth.description: Which auth configuration to apply. `default` uses the plugin's auth.json definition.

headers.description: Extra request headers. Values may contain template placeholders.

query.description: Query parameters. Values may contain template placeholders.

body.description: Request body: a JSON object whose string values may contain template placeholders, or a raw template string.

path.description: Selector for the next link or cursor in the response.

param.description: Query parameter name for cursor or page based pagination.

maxPages.description: Safety cap on pages fetched per job.

selector.description: Opaque selector expression. Grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.

templateString.description: Opaque template string; {{...}} placeholder grammar is defined in docs/16-mapping-language.md.
